info.name: Build Service
info.description:
# Build Service

Base URL: `{{build_service}}{{api_prefix}}`

Manages PC builds and their items. Supports full CRUD for both builds and build items, including error/edge-case scenarios.

## Usage

### Direct Requests
Hit the build-service directly at `{{build_service}}`. All requests require `X-User-Id` (user ID) and `X-User-Role` (`ADMIN` or `USER`).

#### Role behavior per endpoint
- **GET /builds**: ADMIN retorna todas las builds. USER retorna solo las propias.
- **GET /builds/user/{userId}**: ADMIN puede ver cualquier usuario. USER solo puede verse a sí mismo (403 si otro).
- **GET /builds/user/{userId}/{id}**: ADMIN puede ver cualquier build. USER solo las suyas (403 si otro).

### Proxy Requests (via gateway)
Go through the API gateway at `{{api_gateway}}`. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. The gateway reads the role from the JWT and injects `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` automatically.

- **admin_token** → ADMIN, ve todas las builds
- **user_token** → USER, ve solo sus builds

Get tokens by executing a login request in the Auth Service collection.

request.description:
Retrieves all builds. ADMIN → todas las builds. USER → solo las propias (filtradas por X-User-Id).

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Retrieves a single build by its ID. Returns 404 if not found.

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Retrieves all builds for a specific userId. ADMIN → retorna cualquier usuario. USER → solo si coincide con X-User-Id (403 si otro).

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

item.name: Get Build By Id And User Id

request.description:
Retrieves a specific build by userId and buildId. ADMIN → cualquier build. USER → solo si userId coincide con X-User-Id (403 si otro).

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Creates a new build for a user. Requires `userId` and `name`.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Negative test -- sends null `userId` and empty `name`.

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation error)

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Updates an existing build's name. Requires `userId` and `name`.

**Expected:** 200 OK

Deletes a build by ID.

**Expected:** 204 No Content

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Negative test -- tries to delete a non-existent build.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Retrieves all items associated with a specific build.

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Retrieves a single item from a build by item ID. Returns 404 if not found.

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Adds a product item to a build. Requires `productId` and `quantity` (> 0).

**Expected:** 201 Created

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Negative test -- sends quantity = 0 (must be > 0).

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation error)

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

item.name: Create Build Item Build Not Found

request.description:
Negative test -- tries to add an item to a non-existent build.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Deletes a specific item from a build.

**Expected:** 204 No Content

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Negative test -- tries to delete a non-existent item.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Through gateway: Retrieves all builds. ADMIN → todas las builds. USER → solo las propias (filtradas por X-User-Id del JWT).

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

Through gateway: Retrieves a single build by its ID. ADMIN → cualquier build. USER → solo si userId coincide con su JWT (403 si otro).

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

Through gateway: Retrieves all builds for a specific userId. ADMIN → retorna cualquier usuario. USER → solo si coincide con su JWT (403 si otro).

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

USER → retorna solo las builds donde X-User-Id es el dueño. No ve builds de otros usuarios.

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

item.name: Get Builds By User Id (as USER, own)

request.description:
USER viendo sus propias builds → retorna builds del userId 2 (coincide con X-User-Id).

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

item.name: Get Builds By User Id (as USER, other)

request.description:
USER viendo builds de otro usuario → **Expected: 403 Forbidden** (userId 1 != X-User-Id 2).

Requires `X-User-Id` and `X-User-Role` headers.

Through gateway, as USER: retorna solo las builds del usuario autenticado.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <user_token>`.
